<!--
TITLE FORMAT:
EPIC-<MODULE>-<ID> – Short description

EXAMPLE:
EPIC-AUTH-001 – Authentication system
-->


# ⭐ Epic

## 📌 Title

High-level feature or module (e.g. Invoice Management)

---

## 🎯 Objective

What problem does this epic solve?

* Business goal
* User value

---

## 📦 Scope

What is included:

* Features
* Modules
* Functional areas

---

## 🚫 Out of Scope

What is NOT included

---

## 👤 Related User Stories

* # (link issues)

---

## ⚠️ Risks

Potential risks or challenges

---

## 🧠 Notes

Additional context
